arts.ttl: Lecce vs. Napoli: an important battle at both ends
arts.sum: Across their last nine league games, Lecce have collected only two points in Serie A – only Monza (one point) have won fewer in this period. Lecce have not won at home in Serie A since 15 December against Monza (2-1); since then, the Apulians have collected only three points thanks to three draws (L6), and have failed to score in six of their nine home games.
Joe Champion has picked out a score prediction for all the Serie A matches taking place in week 35 of the season.

Despite dealing with tragedy last week, Lecce were able to hold Atalanta to a 1-1 draw in Bergamo, as they remain in 17th place after Venezia and Empoli suffered defeats. The Leccesi will face off Na...
